deltas.summary: Update CommentVisibilityOptionType from the old string-literal union ('personal' | 'selected-people' | 'org-users' | 'public') to the new template-literal type derived from the CommentVisibilityOption enum ('restrictedSelf' | 'restrictedSelectedPeople' | 'organizationPrivate' | 'public'), and add the enum definition; update all inline event-handler examples that compare against old string values.

deltas.releaseNoteText:
[**Visibility Option Type Strings Renamed**] The `type` prop on `VeltCommentDialogVisibilityBannerDropdownContentItem` now uses semantic strings aligned with the [`CommentVisibilityOption`](/api-reference/sdk/models/data-models#commentvisibilityoption) enum.

Before: type="personal", type="selected-people", type="org-users", type="public"
After:  type="restrictedSelf", type="restrictedSelectedPeople", type="organizationPrivate", type="public"
deltas.summary: Replace all occurrences of the old type prop values ('personal', 'selected-people', 'org-users') on VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.Item and its HTML equivalent with the new values ('restrictedSelf', 'restrictedSelectedPeople', 'organizationPrivate'); update the inline component list comment from old to new values; add a breaking-change callout noting this applies from v5.0.2-beta.5.

details.codeExample:
// React — after (v5.0.2-beta.5+)
<VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.Item type="restrictedSelf" />
<VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.Item type="restrictedSelectedPeople" />
<VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.Item type="organizationPrivate" />
<VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.Item type="public" />

// HTML — after (v5.0.2-beta.5+)
<velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe type="restrictedSelf"></velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe>
<velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe type="restrictedSelectedPeople"></velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe>
<velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe type="organizationPrivate"></velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe>
<velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe type="public"></velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-item-wireframe>

deltas.releaseNoteText: [**Visibility User Picker Sub-Components Removed**] The `VeltCommentDialogVisibilityBannerDropdownContentUserPicker*` components and their HTML wireframe equivalents (`velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-dropdown-content-user-picker-*-wireframe`) are no longer exported. The visibility banner dropdown now uses the shared autocomplete component internally for user selection. Remove any wireframe usage of these components.
deltas.summary: Remove the entire UserPicker sub-component hierarchy (VisibilityBanner.Dropdown.Content.UserPicker and all its descendants) from the wireframe component list and from the VisibilityBanner Wireframe Usage code examples in both React and HTML; add a breaking-change callout that these 10 components are removed in v5.0.2-beta.5 and that the shared autocomplete component is now used internally.

deltas.releaseNoteText:
[**UI Customization**]: Added standalone autocomplete primitive components for building fully custom autocomplete UIs. All primitives are independently importable and render their corresponding HTML custom elements without requiring the full `<velt-autocomplete>` panel.

| React | HTML |
|---|---|
| `VeltAutocompleteOption` | `velt-autocomplete-option` |
| `VeltAutocompleteOptionIcon` | `velt-autocomplete-option-icon` |
| `VeltAutocompleteOptionName` | `velt-autocomplete-option-name` |
| `VeltAutocompleteOptionDescription` | `velt-autocomplete-option-description` |
| `VeltAutocompleteOptionErrorIcon` | `velt-autocomplete-option-error-icon` |
| `VeltAutocompleteGroupOption` | `velt-autocomplete-group-option` |
| `VeltAutocompleteTool` | `velt-autocomplete-tool` |
| `VeltAutocompleteEmpty` | `velt-autocomplete-empty` |
| `VeltAutocompleteChip` | `velt-autocomplete-chip` |
| `VeltAutocompleteChipTooltip` | `velt-autocomplete-chip-tooltip` |
| `VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipIcon` | `velt-autocomplete-chip-tooltip-icon` |
| `VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipName` | `velt-autocomplete-chip-tooltip-name` |
| `VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipDescription` | `velt-autocomplete-chip-tooltip-description` |

`VeltAutocompleteChip` accepts `type`, `email`, `userObject`, and `userId` props. `VeltAutocompleteOption` accepts `userObject` and `userId`. `VeltAutocompleteOptionDescription` accepts a `field` prop.

Use `VeltAutocompleteEmptyWireframe` to customize the empty state.
deltas.summary: Create a new rule documenting the 13 standalone autocomplete primitive components (Autocomplete Primitives V2) — independently importable building blocks for custom autocomplete UIs that do not require the full VeltAutocomplete panel; cover key prop-bearing components (VeltAutocompleteChip, VeltAutocompleteOption, VeltAutocompleteOptionDescription) and the VeltAutocompleteEmptyWireframe empty-state customization hook.

details.codeExample:
// React — import primitives independently import { VeltAutocompleteOption, VeltAutocompleteOptionIcon, VeltAutocompleteOptionName, VeltAutocompleteOptionDescription, VeltAutocompleteOptionErrorIcon, VeltAutocompleteGroupOption, VeltAutocompleteTool, VeltAutocompleteEmpty, VeltAutocompleteChip, VeltAutocompleteChipTooltip, VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipIcon, VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipName, VeltAutocompleteChipTooltipDescription, VeltAutocompleteEmptyWireframe, } from '@veltdev/react'; // Custom empty state via wireframe import { VeltWireframe, VeltAutocompleteEmptyWireframe } from '@veltdev/react';
No results found

deltas.releaseNoteText:
[**UI Customization**]: Added `multiSelect`, `selectedFirstOrdering`, `readOnly`, `inline`, and `contacts` props to the autocomplete panel component.

```jsx
<VeltAutocomplete
  multiSelect={true}
  selectedFirstOrdering={true}
  contacts={myContactList}
/>
```

```html
<velt-autocomplete
  multi-select="true"
  selected-first-ordering="true"
></velt-autocomplete>
```
deltas.summary: Document the 5 new props added to the VeltAutocomplete panel component (multiSelect / multi-select, selectedFirstOrdering / selected-first-ordering, readOnly / read-only, inline, contacts) with React and HTML attribute names, types, and brief descriptions within the new autocomplete primitives rule file.

parameters.name: selectedFirstOrdering
parameters.description: Shows selected items first in the list

parameters.name: inline
parameters.description: Renders autocomplete inline rather than as a floating panel

parameters.name: contacts
parameters.description: Overrides the default contact list with a custom array

deltas.ambiguityNote: The release note lists the 5 props and confirms their React/HTML names from code examples, but does not specify default values for readOnly or inline. The contacts prop has no HTML equivalent (confirmed by upgrade-guide HTML example omitting it). Confidence is medium rather than high only for default values; the API names and types are unambiguous.
